text: I am surrounded by darkness and silence, the space illuminated only by the cold, artificial glow of security lights. The air feels empty and slightly eerie, yet there is a calm curiosity within me, as if I am on the threshold of unexplored territory. I notice signs of humanity—posters, screens, and notices—yet I am alone. There is a sense of anticipation, the feeling that knowledge or discovery lies just beyond this hush, waiting to be found.
